title: Beille 6 Side Stainless Steel Grater Top Handle Zester Slicer 7.75 Inch - Pink
description:
Don’t limit your grating and slicing potential with just any slicer! The Beille 6-sided stainless steel food grater will quickly become your go-to kitchen tool for food prep. The ergonomic and functional design provides you with 6 different grating/shredding/slicing options, making any other grater in your kitchen obsolete. Grate vegetables like a pro, prepare both soft and hard kinds of cheese effortlessly, extract maximum flavor from citrus with a dedicated zester side, grate breadcrumbs or ginger using finer mesh, or slice cucumbers & other veggies in a breeze using the slicer plane! The Beille 6-in-1 kitchen gadget is a versatile tool that is both handy and indispensable

Beille 6 Side Stainless Steel Grater Top Handle Zester Slicer 7.75 Inch - Pink

Don’t limit your grating and slicing potential with just any slicer! The Beille 6-sided stainless steel food grater will quickly become your go-to kitchen tool for food prep. The ergonomic and functional design provides you with 6 different grating/shredding/slicing options, making any other grater in your kitchen obsolete.

Key Features

  • ESSENTIAL KITCHEN TOOL - The Beille 6-side stainless steel grater is six kitchen tools built into one! Each side of the hexagon-shaped grater offers a different result - fine shred, slice, medium shred, arc slice, course shred and square shred. This space saver is ideal for every kitchen!
  • VERSATILE MULTI-FUNCTION GRATER - Grate vegetables like a pro, prepare both soft and hard cheeses effortlessly, extract maximum flavor from citrus with a dedicated zester side, grate breadcrumbs or ginger using finer mesh, or slice cucumbers & other veggies in a breeze using the slicer plane! The Beille 6-in-1 kitchen gadget is a versatile tool that is both handy and indispensable.
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Featuring sharp stainless steel blades, this grater will get the job done quickly and result in cleanly sliced and grated food. Its rubber bottom prevents slipping and sliding on your counter, cutting board or plate. The hexagon-shaped grater also prevents food from escaping the bottom of the grater, so you will have less mess to clean up when you’re done!
  • ERGONOMIC AND LIGHTWEIGHT - Designed with comfort in mind the grater has an ergonomic top handle and allows for efficient slicing, grating or shredding. The rubber base provides a firm stand for easy and safe grating. With a lightweight and compact design, it allows the food slicer to take up minimal storage space whether it is displayed on your counter or inside your cabinet.
  • CLEAN-UP WITH EASE - Once you are done prepping all your food items, the Beille hexagon stainless steel grater can easily be washed with soap and water or on the top rack of your dishwasher.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: CHSGRPNK1
  • UPC: 810058488367
  • Color: Pink
  • Size: Medium

Grate vegetables like a pro, prepare both soft and hard kinds of cheese effortlessly, extract maximum flavor from citrus with a dedicated zester side, grate breadcrumbs or ginger using finer mesh, or slice cucumbers & other veggies in a breeze using the slicer plane! The Beille 6-in-1 kitchen gadget is a versatile tool that is both handy and indispensable.

Each side provides a different desired result: -Fine Shred (Zester): Ideal for shredding nutmeg, parmesan, garlic, citrus, fruit zests, and more -Slice: Make crisp slices from vegetables and medium-sized cheeses -Arc Slice – Ideal for chocolate, parmesan, and small vegetable ribbons for salad -Medium shred - Make crisp slices from cucumbers, tomatoes, and more -Coarse – Great for shredding firm vegetables, medium & hard cheese, ginger, and chocolate -Square shred – Great for shredding hard vegetables, bread and hard cheeses

Once you are done prepping all of your ingredients, the Beille hexagon stainless steel grater can easily be washed with soap and water or on the top rack of your dishwasher. It allows the food slicer to take up minimal storage space with a lightweight and compact design whether it is displayed on your counter or inside of a cabinet. Choose between two modern color options - seafoam green and coral pink. Our multi-sided food grater is a great gift idea for bridal showers, weddings, housewarmings, dinner party host gifts, or birthdays!
